name: Breadcrumb
description: Navigation trail showing the current page location in a hierarchy.
avoidWhen: Flat navigation with no hierarchy - use Tabs or links.
accessibilityRequirements: Wrapped in <nav> with aria-label='Breadcrumb'. Last item has aria-current='page'.

parts.name: BreadcrumbItem
parts.description: Single item in a Breadcrumb trail.

href.description: Link URL. Omit for the current (last) page.

current.description: Marks this as the current page. Sets aria-current='page'.

parts.name: BreadcrumbSeparator
parts.description: Visual separator between breadcrumb items. Defaults to '/'.
parts.whenToUse: Always between BreadcrumbItems inside a Breadcrumb.

parts.name: BreadcrumbEllipsis
parts.description: Collapsed overflow indicator in breadcrumb trails.
parts.whenToUse: When middle breadcrumb items are collapsed for compact layouts.

aria-label.description: Accessible label for the ellipsis indicator.

parts.name: BreadcrumbPage
parts.description: Current page item in a breadcrumb trail (aria-current='page').
parts.whenToUse: As the final breadcrumb item for the active page.

examples.title: With Custom Separator
examples.code:
<sg-breadcrumb>
    <sg-breadcrumb-item href="/">Home</sg-breadcrumb-item>
    <sg-breadcrumb-separator>
        <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M6 4l4 4-4 4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        </svg>
    </sg-breadcrumb-separator>
    <sg-breadcrumb-item href="/components">Components</sg-breadcrumb-item>
    <sg-breadcrumb-separator>
        <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M6 4l4 4-4 4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        </svg>
    </sg-breadcrumb-separator>
    <sg-breadcrumb-item current={true}>Breadcrumb</sg-breadcrumb-item>
</sg-breadcrumb>
